markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review CRO strategy to hit aggressive 2026 lead goals.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CRO is the top priority.** Hitting the 2026 lead goal requires an unrealistic 8x traffic increase at current conversion rates. The focus must be on significantly improving the conversion rate (CR).](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**The trial form is the biggest blocker.** Its length creates significant friction. A redesign (e.g., multi-step) is the highest-impact, fastest-lift opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [**Messaging needs a strategic shift.** Move from a feature-focused message to a "pain point → path to relief" narrative to drive larger, 2x+ CR lifts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Paid ads are underfunded for learning.** Current spend ($3k–$5k/mo) is insufficient to gather meaningful data. A budget of \~$10k/mo is the typical threshold needed to find efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Aggressive Goals & Low Conversion

  - [**2026 Lead Goal:** 570 leads (trials + demos).](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Current Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Monthly Traffic: \~17,000 sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Conversion Rate (CR): \~0.07% (from all traffic) or \~0.26% (from engaged sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**The Math:** At the current CR, hitting the goal requires an unrealistic 8x traffic increase. A more feasible 2–3x traffic increase still requires a 2.5x CR improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Solution 1: Fix the Trial Form

  - [**Primary Blocker:** The long, single-page trial form is the main source of conversion friction.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [**Recommended Fix:** Redesign the form to be more approachable.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [**Multi-step Flow:** Break the form into smaller, logical steps (e.g., Homebase). This reduces perceived effort and maintains momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Field Audit:** Debate internally which fields are truly critical for trial sign-up versus which can be collected later in the user journey.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Solution 2: Shift Messaging to Pain Points

  - [**Current Approach:** Messaging focuses on product clarity and validation ("what it does").](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Recommended Shift:** Adopt a "pain point → path to relief" narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach resonates more deeply with user needs and can drive larger, 2x+ CR lifts, unlike smaller tweaks (5–20% lift).](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Example Pain Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
          - [Uncentralized communication (using texting).](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
          - [Lack of frontline visibility for leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [**Execution:** Use customer research (e.g., sales call transcripts, focus groups) to identify and frame these core pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)

### Solution 3: Optimize Other Channels

  - [**Homepage CTAs:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Action:** Test a single "Get Started Free" CTA (since the trial is free forever) to reduce user choice friction.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Note:** Dual CTAs can also work; test the impact of removing the "Watch Video" button.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [**Blog CTAs:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Action:** Test a persistent, sticky CTA bar in blog posts to increase visibility and capture more traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Paid Ads:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
      - [**Issue:** Current spend ($3k–$5k/mo) is insufficient to gather enough data to find efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
      - [**Action:** Consider a larger, time-boxed experiment (e.g., $10k/mo) to determine if paid search is a viable channel or if paid social is a better fit.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
      - [Prioritize redesigning the trial form to a multi-step flow.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [Develop and test a "pain point → path to relief" messaging strategy, starting with the homepage hero section.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Test a single "Get Started Free" homepage CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [Test a persistent, sticky CTA bar in blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Evaluate a larger, time-boxed paid ad experiment (e.g., $10k/mo) to gather sufficient data.](https://fathom.video/share/ZXNu7yjuZ-6N9quh_suFKwYm1dJaKAtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
